positive: A maximalist, symmetrical mandala arrangement featuring whimsical oversized bioluminescent mushrooms, floating celestial moons, and winding cosmic vines. The style is intricate, high-contrast graphic vector illustration, designed for screen printing, with bold outlines and clean silhouettes. The color palette is dominated by deep midnight indigo and sapphire blue, dramatically contrasted by glowing neon accents of electric teal, lime green, and lavender. Circular composition, highly detailed, perfect for central apparel placement.
